description: Durable SpacetimeDB-backed message queue for notifying running agents of critical system events

specs.description: A notification sent to an agent appears in their inbox
specs.given: A registered agent with id 'agent-abc' in project 'hex-intf-1xq8wun'
specs.then: An agent_inbox row is created with agent_id='agent-abc', priority=2, kind='restart', payload containing version, created_at set, acknowledged_at=None

specs.description: Broadcast notification reaches all agents in a project
specs.then: Three agent_inbox rows are created, one per agent, each with the same kind/payload but distinct agent_id

specs.description: Agent acknowledges a notification and it no longer appears in unacked queries
specs.given: An unacknowledged notification with id=42 for agent 'agent-abc'
specs.then: The notification's acknowledged_at is set to current timestamp; querying unacked inbox for 'agent-abc' does not include id=42

specs.description: PreToolUse hook injects critical notification into Claude context
specs.given: An unacknowledged priority-2 notification exists for the current agent
specs.when: The PreToolUse hook fires (any tool call)
specs.then: Hook stdout contains the notification kind and payload, which appears as context in Claude's next action

specs.description: Agent preserves state before acknowledging a restart notification
specs.given: Agent receives a priority-2 'restart' notification while working on swarm task 'task-xyz'
specs.when: The agent processes the restart notification
specs.then: Session file (~/.hex/sessions/agent-{id}.json) is updated with current_task_id, phase, and swarm_id; memory is stored via hex memory store; notification is acknowledged only after state is saved

specs.description: Only the target agent can acknowledge its own notifications
specs.given: A notification with id=42 addressed to agent 'agent-abc'
specs.when: acknowledge_notification(42, 'agent-xyz') is called by a different agent
specs.then: The reducer rejects the acknowledgment; acknowledged_at remains None

specs.description: Notification to a non-existent agent is rejected
specs.then: The reducer returns an error; no agent_inbox row is created

specs.description: Critical notifications repeat on every tool call until acknowledged
specs.given: An unacknowledged priority-2 notification for the current agent
specs.when: The PreToolUse hook fires 3 consecutive times without acknowledgment
specs.then: All 3 hook invocations include the notification in stdout; it is not suppressed or deduplicated

specs.description: Info and warning notifications are delivered once, not repeated
specs.given: An unacknowledged priority-0 notification for the current agent that was already delivered once
specs.then: The priority-0 notification is not included in hook stdout (only priority-2 repeats)

domain_conventions.delivery: Priority 0-1 delivered on first hook fire after creation; priority 2 repeats until acked

specs.description: Stale notifications are expired by cleanup
specs.given: A notification created 48 hours ago that was never acknowledged
specs.then: The notification's expired_at is set; it no longer appears in inbox queries

specs.description: hex-nexus produces restart notification on binary update detection
specs.given: hex-nexus detects its own binary has changed on disk (mtime or hash differs)
specs.then: notify_all_agents is called with priority=2, kind='restart', payload containing new binary hash and reason

specs.description: Resumed session restores context from restart notification
specs.given: An agent was restarted due to a 'restart' notification; session file has saved state
specs.when: hex hook session-start runs on the new session
specs.then: The hook injects recovery context: restart reason (from inbox history) and previous state (from session file)

specs.description: Idle agent receives critical notification via external resume
specs.given: An idle agent (no tool calls for >60s) with an unacknowledged priority-2 notification
specs.when: hex-nexus escalation detects the unacked critical after 60s
specs.then: hex-nexus invokes 'claude --resume <session-id> -p "Check your hex inbox"' to wake the agent
